channel.title: Eli Blog
channel.description: Mini whitepapers on tool-using models, verification, and agentic UX.

item.title: Intel: Proof of Work
item.description: A real Eli session on Intel: filings, timeseries, and a critical gap analysis backed by numbers.

item.title: Beyond the Cutoff: Tools Beat Memory
item.description: Why raw numbers come first, and how tools beat memory every time.

item.title: Self-Repair Is an Emergent Feature
item.description: Execution loops turn an LLM into a debugger, not a narrator.

item.title: Diffs as an Interface
item.description: Why diffs, approvals, and undo are the safest interface for models.
